---
title: "Jiayi Liu"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: profile.jpg
  links:
    - icon: twitter
      text: twitter
      href: https://twitter.com
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com
    - icon: google
      text: Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com
---

My primary research interest is applied microeconomics, with a focus on topics in violence, healthcare, and media.

## Education

Ph.D. student in Economics, 2023 - 

B.A. in Economics (with a minor in Business Data Science), Shanghai Jiao Tong University, 2023

Exchange Student, Johns Hopkins University, 2022

## Experience

Research Assistant (for Professor Daniel Polsky), Johns Hopkins University, Bloomberg School of Public Health, Jun. 2022 - Sep. 2022
